prompt: Photorealistic portrait, vertical 9:16. Close-up shot of a gorgeous Vietnamese woman with long dark wavy hair, fair skin, and striking red lips. She is wearing a traditional red Ao Dai. She gently clasps her hands together in front of her chest, looking directly at the camera with sincere, sparkling eyes and a soft, beautiful smile. The background is beautifully blurred with warm yellow bokeh lights from festive Tet decorations. 8k, highly detailed, cinematic lighting, depth of field.
